caption: A presentation slide titled "What funds can be used?" is shown, featuring a colorful diagram of overlapping circles and labels. The central circles are labeled "CPA," "IZ," "Tax title sales," and "General fund/free cash." Surrounding these are various funding sources, including "Real estate transfer fees?," "Special bylaw/ordinance payments," "Municipal bond," "Cell phone tower lease payments," "Short-term rental fee?," "Tax override," "Marijuana tax?," "Developer negotiated fees," and "Donations." A note on the right explains, "Common = municipal account through municipal treasurer." A yellow bar at the bottom contains the letters "MHP." Small video inserts of people are visible in the top corners and bottom edges of the screen. Across the sequence of frames, the image remains static, with no changes to the text, graphics, or layout, although the people in the small video inserts slightly shift their positions.
